main.description: Tuning for the hour-tracking 'sky' theme (src/lib/skyTheme.js). A singleton at at://{me}/is.dame.sky/self. When `enabled`, each entry in `hours` layers a parametric override onto that hour's built-in palette — warming the borders and faint/muted text toward the horizon color, deepening them for contrast, optionally replacing the background, and adding a soft glow to chosen elements. When `enabled` is false (or no record exists), the site uses its hardcoded hourly derivation unchanged. Only hours that carry an override need to be listed. Edited in the admin 'Sky theme studio'.

enabled.description: Whether this record drives the sky palette. False = use the built-in derivation.

hours.description: Per-hour tuning overrides. Each entry keys off its `hour` (0 = 12am Eastern … 23 = 11pm, matching og/time.js). Unlisted hours use the built-in palette.

hourTuning.description: A single hour's parametric override. All knobs are optional and default to a no-op, so an entry with only `hour` renders identically to the built-in palette.

hour.description: Eastern hour this override applies to (0 = 12am … 23 = 11pm).

pop.description: Horizon 'pop' hex the borders / faint-muted text / inline highlight warm toward, e.g. #efa82b. Defaults to this hour's horizon band.

page.description: Absolute page (background) hex. When set, the whole neutral ramp — page, chrome surfaces, ink, rules — re-derives from it; the art-based link accent stays tied to the frame. Omit to keep the sun-tracked background.

surfaceSep.description: Multiplier (×100) on how far the chrome surfaces sit from the page — 100 = built-in separation (1×). Integer because atproto records can't hold floats; divide by 100 for the real multiplier.

ruleWarmth.description: How far the borders blend toward the pop color, as a percent (0 = keep their own hue, 100 = full pop hue).

ruleContrast.description: How much the borders are pushed away from the page for contrast (darker by day, lighter by night), ×100 — e.g. 24 = a 0.24 delta.

inkWarmth.description: How far the faint / muted text blends toward the pop color, as a percent.

inkContrast.description: How much the faint / muted text is pushed away from the page for contrast, ×100.

glowColor.description: Glow / shine hex. Defaults to the pop color.

glowSize.description: Glow blur radius in px. 0 = no glow.

glowStrength.description: Glow opacity, as a percent (0–100). 0 = no glow.

glowTargets.description: Which element families receive the glow.
